Admin._comment: Only these emails may sign in. Empty = no one (fail closed). SuperAdminEmails additionally see cross-tenant pages.

Dashboard._comment: Public base URL of the redirect site, used to render full short URLs. Empty = show the bare code.

CustomDomain._comment: DNS-TXT verification: users create a TXT record at <VerificationHostLabel>.<domain> with value <TxtValuePrefix><token>.

Email._comment: Mode: Resend (send all via Resend) | Log (dev: log every email) | Hybrid (Resend for DeliverableDomains, log the rest). Set Mode=Hybrid + DeliverableDomains in appsettings.Development.json/user-secrets to grab magic links for non-deliverable test addresses from the console.

Resend._comment: ApiKey comes from user-secrets (Resend:ApiKey). FromAddress must be a Resend-verified domain in prod; onboarding@resend.dev delivers only to your own account email for local testing.

Meta._comment: The THREADS-specific app ID/secret from developers.facebook.com (App Settings → Basic → 'Threads app ID'/'Threads app secret' — a separate pair from the app-level App ID/Secret shown above them; ThreadsConnector needs the Threads-specific ones). AppSecret comes from user-secrets/Railway env (Meta:AppSecret) — never commit it. RedirectUri must exactly match the app's Redirect Callback URL.
